name: Beyond Pricing Revenue Management API
what_it_does: Beyond Pricing REST API for dynamic pricing and revenue management for vacation rental operators. Enables AI agents to retrieve price recommendations based on demand signals, sync pricing to OTA channels, access market insights and competitive intelligence, manage minimum stay rules and booking restrictions, and integrate revenue management data with property management systems.
use_cases: Retrieving dynamic price recommendations for vacation rental listings from pricing automation agents
Syncing optimized rates to Airbnb, VRBO, and Booking.com from channel management agents
Accessing market demand and competitor pricing data from revenue strategy agents
Adjusting minimum stay and booking window rules from occupancy optimization agents
not_for: Hotel revenue management without short-term rental channel integration
Commercial real estate pricing without OTA distribution
Fixed-rate rental operations without dynamic pricing strategies
best_when: A vacation rental property manager wants AI agents to automate revenue management by applying data-driven dynamic pricing across OTA channels based on demand signals, events, and market conditions.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Automated pricing directly impacts revenue and occupancy. Always validate pricing rules and review recommendations before broad deployment to live listings.

auth.notes: Beyond Pricing uses API key authentication. Keys are account-scoped with access to all properties. API available on paid plans. No granular scope control.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial available; API access on paid plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-listing monthly pricing; enterprise pricing for large portfolios
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based, founded 2013. One of the original vacation rental dynamic pricing tools. Competes primarily with PriceLabs and Wheelhouse. Strong Airbnb integration history.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Automated pricing directly affects rental revenue — validate rules before deploying
No public MCP server — REST API with API key auth
No webhooks — must poll for updated price recommendations
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access to all properties
API access only on paid plans
Price recommendations are ML-generated — verify model logic before full automation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Pricing and revenue data for rental properties. SOC2. API key with no scopes — full account access. No webhooks requires polling.

security_score_components.security_notes: Revenue management data. SOC2. API key only, no scopes. US data residency.
